# Repository Agent Pack

This folder contains the selected Agency agents configured for this repository.

## Included Agents

### Core Hires
- data-engineer.md
- database-optimizer.md
- analytics-reporter.md
- devops-automator.md
- security-engineer.md
- technical-writer.md
- code-reviewer.md

### Phase 2 Hires
- ai-engineer.md
- ux-architect.md
- ui-designer.md
- product-manager.md

## Usage

In GitHub Copilot Chat, you can call an agent by name in your prompt, for example:
- "Use the Data Engineer agent to improve the silver to gold transformations."
- "Use the Code Reviewer agent to review my SQL scripts for risks and regressions."

## Source and Credit

These agent definitions were copied from:
- Repository: https://github.com/msitarzewski/agency-agents
- Commit: 6254154899f510eb4a4de10561fecfc1f32ff17f
- License: MIT

Local copies were selected based on this project's hiring decision for learning and portfolio goals in data engineering, analytics, data science, software development, and DevOps.
